nasb.text: For the entrance of the inner sanctuary he made doors of olive wood, the lintel and five-sided doorposts.

esv.text: For the entrance to the inner sanctuary he made doors of olivewood; the lintel and the doorposts were five-sided.

cnv.text: 內殿的入口，他用橄欖木做了門扇、門楣和五根門柱。

ccb.text: 至圣所的门、门楣和门柱都是橄榄木造的，门柱呈五角形。
